message:
feat(e2e): add report rendering JSONL -> markdown (bd-1w6k.6.3)

Implements report_render module with:
- JSONL parsers for RunRecordV1 and BenchmarkSummary records
- Markdown renderer for run records (grouped comparison tables)
- Markdown renderer for benchmark summaries (methodology, environment,
  latency/throughput tables, per-iteration detail sections)
- File-based convenience functions for one-command report generation

10 tests, 264 total lib tests passing, clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
